summary: Tested MOJO Profile Modal auto-save feature implementation. Found and fixed a critical bug where auto-save wasn't triggering due to callback reference instability in useAutoSave hook.

ui_bugs.issue: Auto-save was not triggering API calls due to onSave callback being recreated on each render, causing the timeout cleanup to run before auto-save could complete
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - Modified useAutoSave to use useRef for onSave callback

issues: Auto-save indicator shows 'Unsaved changes' but then disappears after timeout without showing 'Saving...' or 'Saved' states

action_items: Verify the useAutoSave fix by testing the full auto-save flow after the fix is deployed
The fix applied: Changed useAutoSave hook to store onSave in a ref (onSaveRef) and removed onSave from useEffect dependencies to prevent cleanup from canceling the timeout
critical_code_review_comments: useAutoSave hook had onSave in its dependency array but onSave was passed as inline arrow function (data) => handleSaveSection(section.id, data) which gets recreated on every render
This caused the cleanup function to clear the timeout before the 1.5s debounce could complete
Fix: Use useRef for onSave callback and only depend on [data, delay] in the effect

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Auto-save UI appears but was not triggering API due to bug (now fixed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-save feature had a bug where changes weren't being saved. The useAutoSave hook in MojoSectionEditors.jsx was fixed to use useRef for the onSave callback. After fix is deployed, need to verify: 1) Change a field in edit mode, 2) See 'Unsaved changes' indicator, 3) Wait 1.5+ seconds, 4) See 'Saving...' then 'Saved' indicators, 5) Verify API call to /answers/bulk was made. Test credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Pet ID: pet-99a708f1722a
features_tested: MOJO Modal opens from pet avatar - WORKING
Drill-in editing opens inline editor with dropdowns - WORKING
Auto-save indicator shows 'Unsaved changes' on change - WORKING
Auto-save triggers API call after 1.5s - NOT WORKING (bug found and fixed)
Done button visible and clickable - WORKING

bug_rca.issue: Auto-save not triggering API calls despite showing 'Unsaved changes' indicator
bug_rca.root_cause: In useAutoSave hook (MojoSectionEditors.jsx), the onSave callback was included in useEffect dependencies. Since onSave was passed as inline arrow function from parent component, it was recreated on every render, causing the cleanup function to clear the pending timeout before the 1.5s debounce completed.
reproduction_steps: 2. Click Edit button on Soul Profile section
5. Wait - indicator disappears without showing 'Saving...' or making API call
bug_rca.fix_applied: Modified useAutoSave hook to: 1) Store onSave in useRef (onSaveRef), 2) Update ref when onSave changes, 3) Use onSaveRef.current in the setTimeout callback, 4) Remove onSave from useEffect dependencies to prevent cleanup running on callback recreation
